world.title: "Diverse arts, rich culture, glorious history": Rahul Gandhi greets people on Rajasthan Foundation Day
world.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi on Monday extended greetings to the people of Rajasthan on the occasion of the state's Foundation Day, highlighting its rich cultural heritage and historical legacy. In a post shared on X, Gandhi conveyed his wishes to residents of the state, referring to Rajasthan as "Veer Bhumi" and praising its contributions to the nation's identity. "Heartiest greetings to all the residents of the state on the Foundation Day of Veer Bhumi Rajasthan. Rajasthan, replete with diverse arts, rich culture, and a glorious history, is an invaluable heritage of India. The traditions and legacy here are our pride," the post read. https
